revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '<div class="pathnavbox"> * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|京都府の政治|京都府の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav|主...'
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|京都府の政治|京都府の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|京都府の行政}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
[[京都府]]にある[[行政機関]]のカテゴリ。 [[Category:京都府の官公庁|きようせいきかん]] [[Category:京都府の行政|きようせいきかん]] [[Category:日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)|きようと]]

revision.comment: 体裁を調整。
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|京都府の政治|京都府の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|京都府の行政}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
{{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|京都府|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}} [[Category:京都府の官公庁|きようせいきかん]] [[Category:日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)|きようとふ]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]

revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA content, refresh translated-page template, tidy interwikis & categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Merge [[Category:京都府の官公庁]] into [[Category:Government Offices in Kyoto Prefecture]] via bot
Merge [[Category:京都府の行政]] into [[Category:Administration of Kyoto Prefecture]] via bot
Merge [[Category:日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)]] into [[Category:Administrative Agencies of Japan by Prefecture]] via bot

Immanuelle moved page [[Category:京都府の行政機関]] to [[Category:Administrative Agencies in Kyoto Prefecture]]: Merge [[Category:京都府の行政機関]] into [[Category:Administrative Agencies in Kyoto Prefecture]] via bot
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - ": (Text replacement - "" to ""
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - ")links on [[:Category" to "links on " to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Text replacement - "[[Category:[[Category:" to "[[Category:"
Text replacement - "↵]]↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|京都府の政治|京都府の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|京都府の行政}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}} }} {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|京都府|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|京都府|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}} {{translated page|ja|Category:京都府の行政機関|version=85407826}} [[Category:Administration of Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Administrative Agencies of Japan by Prefecture]] [[Category:Agency for Cultural Affairs]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Government Offices in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:京都府の行政機関]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:文化庁]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|京都府の政治|京都府の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|京都府の行政}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}} }} {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|京都府|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|京都府|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}} {{translated page|ja|Category:京都府の行政機関|version=85407826}} [[Category:Administration of Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Administrative Agencies of Japan by Prefecture]] [[Category:Agency for Cultural Affairs]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Government Offices in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:京都府の行政機関]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:文化庁]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:日本の都道府県" to "Category:Prefectures of Japan"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9561078)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|京都府の政治|京都府の官公庁}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|京都府の行政}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
}}
{{Template:Category:Prefectures of Japan/下位|京都府|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:京都府の行政機関|version=85407826}}
{{wikidata link|Q9561078}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:京都府の行政機関]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:文化庁]]
[[Category:Administration of Kyoto Prefecture]]
[[Category:Administrative Agencies of Japan by Prefecture]]
[[Category:Agency for Cultural Affairs]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Government Offices in Kyoto Prefecture]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Administrative_Agencies_in_Kyoto_Prefecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Administrative_Agencies_in_Kyoto_Prefecture for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
